content: Administrative Fines and Penalties Any shipowner, master mariner, or their representative who fails or refuses to present employment records, such as payroll and daily time records, pay slips, or other documents, such as medical records, when required by the individual seafarer, the Secretary of the DMW, the Secretary of the DOLE, their duly authorized representatives, or by the duly authorized representative of a recognized organization, shall be subject to administrative fine ranging from One hundred thousand pesos (P100,000.00) to One million pesos (P1,000,000.00). Noting the urgency of the full implementation of this IRR, the DMW, DOLE, and other concerned government agencies, within a reasonable period of time, shall issue the appropriate guidelines to implement this section.
